query:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.role, u.password_hash, c.company_code, c.company_name
FROM users u
JOIN erp_companies c ON u.erp_company_id = c.id
WHERE (c.company_code LIKE '%test%' OR c.company_name LIKE '%test%')
  AND u.role IN ('super_admin', 'admin')
LIMIT 10;
